# 📋 Feature Implementation Plans — Index

> **Folder:** `.github/idea/`
> Each file below is a complete, step-by-step implementation guide for one feature.

## 🗺️ Roadmap Summary

```
v1.1 — Foundation
  ✅ #01 Supabase Auth + Guest Mode
  ✅ #02 Persistent Room State
  ✅ #03 Code Snippet Save/Load

v1.2 — Power Features
  ⬜ #04 Real Test Case Judge (Judge0)
  ⬜ #08 AI Chat Pair Programmer
  ⬜ #10 Session Timer / Interview Mode
  ⬜ #09 Read-Only Shareable Links

v1.3 — Collaboration++
  ⬜ #05 Whiteboard / Drawing Mode
  ⬜ #12 Multi-File Editor
  ⬜ #06 Voice Call (WebRTC)
  ⬜ #13 Room Tags & Public Lobby

v1.4 — Growth & Polish
  ⬜ #07 User Dashboard & Stats
  ⬜ #21 Achievements & Leaderboard
  ⬜ #14 Code Screenshot Share
  ⬜ #20 Room Replay / Playback
  ⬜ #18 Push Notifications
```
